qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa IN (SELECT TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa FROM TTA09_LIQUIDACION WHERE TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {%= #SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_liquidacion %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa IN (SELECT TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa FROM TTA09_LIQUIDACION WHERE TTA09_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {%= #SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_liquidacion %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
